privileged_info_summary: The levee freeboard threshold is confirmed to be 3.0 ft. All file paths (project_dir, survey_file, output_csv, output_plot, ground_truth_path) exactly match the paths defined in the environment's setup and evaluation scripts. The levee survey data is synthetically generated dynamically during task setup to include a failure zone with freeboard < 3.0 ft and pass zones with freeboard > 3.0 ft.
